allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', d.get\('version'\)\); deps=d.get\('dependencies',{}\); [print\(k,v\) for k,v in deps.items\(\) if 'xml' in k]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', d.get\('version'\)\); deps=d.get\('dependencies',{}\); [print\(k,v\) for k,v in deps.items\(\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('type:', d.get\('type',''\)\); print\('main:', d.get\('main',''\)\); deps=d.get\('dependencies',{}\); print\('deps:', list\(deps.keys\(\)\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', d.get\('version'\)\); print\('main:', d.get\('main'\)\); print\('optionalDeps:', list\(\(d.get\('optionalDependencies'\) or {}\).keys\(\)\)\)")
